Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 1 

Variable Details 

This section of the codebook contains one entry for each variable in the TAF claims files. Each entry contains variable 
details to facilitate understanding and use of the variables. 

ACTL_SRVC_QTY 

LABEL: Actual Service Quantity 

DESCRIPTION: The quantity of a drug, service, or product that is rendered/dispensed for a prescription, on a specific 
date of
